examples: Storm clouds move in over a Utah cornfield at sunset.
It has now pioneered a method to turn cornfield debris into glycols.
They first settled in a cornfield abandoned by Native Indians and named it Plymouth Plantation.
Male Chorus: (Singing) It was a lover and his lass, that o'er the green cornfield did pass.
The wall of the title is a wishing wall that the kids discover in a cornfield.
